canonical_question: What are PCI DSS requirements, payment provider constraints, cross-border payment regulations for startups?
aliases: How do I set up PCI-compliant payment processing for my startup?
Stripe vs Adyen vs Braintree PCI compliance comparison for startups
What payment licenses and regulations do startups need for cross-border payments?

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: PCI DSS 4.0.1 mandatory compliance deadline March 31, 2025

constraints: PCI DSS compliance mandatory for any entity storing/processing/transmitting cardholder data
US MTL required in 40+ states if holding/transmitting customer funds
PSD2 SCA required for EU/EEA transactions
BSA/AML compliance required for all payment processors
Customer identification records must be retained 5+ years
PCI DSS 4.0.1 SAQ A eligibility requires redirect or iframe with script protection

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Startup only needs general legal entity formation guidance
Startup is building a cryptocurrency payment platform
Startup needs general fintech licensing strategy

inputs_needed.question: What is the startup's payment model?
Which geographic markets will you process payments in?
What is the user's technical skill level?
What is the expected annual transaction volume?

depends_on.label: Legal entity must be formed before applying for payment processing

related_to.label: Payment terms must be included in ToS and privacy policy
